scenes.text:
The best leaders are servants first.
Their power comes from service.

Servant leadership is not weakness. It is the highest form of strength. When you serve your team, you remove obstacles. You create clarity. You empower
people to do their best work. The leader who serves creates a culture where everyone wants to give their best because they feel valued.

Every day, ask yourself one question. How can I make my team is job easier today?
That single question transforms you from a boss into a leader people love working for.
scenes.highlight: make my team is job easier

scenes.text:
The measure of a leader is not the number of
people who serve them, but the number they serve.

How do you serve your team? Share
your leadership style. Follow for servant leadership.
